## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and ProjectMark to discuss SEO progress, content strategy, and publishing workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/Lmsc4kizXUUE_1GNPpK6hMgCLksRWhRn?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [28 articles ready for immediate publishing; Gus to review and publish over the weekend](https://fathom.video/share/Lmsc4kizXUUE_1GNPpK6hMgCLksRWhRn?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
  - [SEO success hinges on timely article publishing; current backlog of \~50 articles pending](https://fathom.video/share/Lmsc4kizXUUE_1GNPpK6hMgCLksRWhRn?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [ProjectMark seeing great engagement with bid/pipeline management content; future content to focus on this area](https://fathom.video/share/Lmsc4kizXUUE_1GNPpK6hMgCLksRWhRn?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [GrowthX team needs renewed CMS access; Gus initiating this with web designer](https://fathom.video/share/Lmsc4kizXUUE_1GNPpK6hMgCLksRWhRn?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)

## Topics

### Account Transition and Marketing Initiatives

  - [Prateek Gupta taking over account management from Andrew at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/Lmsc4kizXUUE_1GNPpK6hMgCLksRWhRn?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [ProjectMark busy with product launches, internal marketing changes](https://fathom.video/share/Lmsc4kizXUUE_1GNPpK6hMgCLksRWhRn?tab=summary&timestamp=58.0)
  - [Focus on automations, tracking, and lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/Lmsc4kizXUUE_1GNPpK6hMgCLksRWhRn?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)

### SEO Reporting and Progress

  - [GrowthX simplifying reports: week-over-week clicks and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/Lmsc4kizXUUE_1GNPpK6hMgCLksRWhRn?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [101 articles published; \~50 pending publication](https://fathom.video/share/Lmsc4kizXUUE_1GNPpK6hMgCLksRWhRn?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Gus requests addition of monthly and month-over-month metrics](https://fathom.video/share/Lmsc4kizXUUE_1GNPpK6hMgCLksRWhRn?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)

### Content Strategy and Performance

  - [High engagement with bid/pipeline management content](https://fathom.video/share/Lmsc4kizXUUE_1GNPpK6hMgCLksRWhRn?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
      - [LinkedIn campaign and email blast for related article highly successful](https://fathom.video/share/Lmsc4kizXUUE_1GNPpK6hMgCLksRWhRn?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [Future content to focus more on bid management, pipeline management topics](https://fathom.video/share/Lmsc4kizXUUE_1GNPpK6hMgCLksRWhRn?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [Potential creation of downloadable guide/ebook on these high-performing topics](https://fathom.video/share/Lmsc4kizXUUE_1GNPpK6hMgCLksRWhRn?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)

### Content Review and Publishing Process

  - [28 articles immediately ready for publishing in CMS](https://fathom.video/share/Lmsc4kizXUUE_1GNPpK6hMgCLksRWhRn?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
  - [Gus's review process:](https://fathom.video/share/Lmsc4kizXUUE_1GNPpK6hMgCLksRWhRn?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
      - [Thought leadership articles: detailed review, sometimes involving Tom](https://fathom.video/share/Lmsc4kizXUUE_1GNPpK6hMgCLksRWhRn?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
      - [General articles: quick overview, focus on backlinks and images](https://fathom.video/share/Lmsc4kizXUUE_1GNPpK6hMgCLksRWhRn?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - [Prateek emphasizes importance of streamlined publishing process](https://fathom.video/share/Lmsc4kizXUUE_1GNPpK6hMgCLksRWhRn?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

### Topic Refinement

  - [Removing/avoiding topics related to risk management, financial management, insurance](https://fathom.video/share/Lmsc4kizXUUE_1GNPpK6hMgCLksRWhRn?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
  - [Focusing on technology involvement, CRM, marketing development, industry insights](https://fathom.video/share/Lmsc4kizXUUE_1GNPpK6hMgCLksRWhRn?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)

### Action Items and Next Steps

  - [Gus to publish 28 ready articles over the weekend](https://fathom.video/share/Lmsc4kizXUUE_1GNPpK6hMgCLksRWhRn?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
  - [Gus reaching out to web designer for GrowthX CMS access](https://fathom.video/share/Lmsc4kizXUUE_1GNPpK6hMgCLksRWhRn?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
  - [Prateek to prepare \~10 new articles for next week](https://fathom.video/share/Lmsc4kizXUUE_1GNPpK6hMgCLksRWhRn?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)
  - [GrowthX to create articles in staging with images for easier review/publishing](https://fathom.video/share/Lmsc4kizXUUE_1GNPpK6hMgCLksRWhRn?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)
